name: openags@paper-search-mcp
description: Exploratory preprint search over arXiv, PubMed, bioRxiv, and medRxiv. Useful for discovery, not reliable citation verification by itself.

env_schema.name: PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY
env_schema.label: Semantic Scholar API Key
env_schema.description: Optional. Some upstream sources may work without a key.

reasons: Queries external preprint and biomedical search APIs.

known_limitations: arXiv keyword results can be noisy for exact benchmark names such as RAGAS, ARES, RAGTruth, and RAGChecker.
Do not use this preset alone for citation-grade title, DOI, venue, or BibTeX verification.
